name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BodyBalanceHelper.ArmsOutStraightenElbows
summary: Multiplier for straightening the elbows based on the amount of arms out(lean2) 0 = dont straighten elbows. Otherwise straighten elbows proportionately to armsOut.
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
